data.title: Bybit Detects and Blocks Coordinated Fake Deposit Attacks, Preventing Over $1 Billion DOT in Potential Losses
data.description: On April 8, 2026, in Dubai, UAE, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally by trading volume, reported uncovering and halting a string of synchronized fraudulent deposit assaults on various blockchain networks. The platform's Group Risk Control unit successfully prevented these attacks, safeguarding against potential threats.

data.title: Saudi housing platform Jood Eskan outlines structured model for accountable housing support
data.description: The recent unveiling of a new model in Saudi Arabia has sparked conversations on transparency, governance, and trust in the realm of housing support systems. This development is centered around Jood Eskan, the national housing assistance platform of Saudi Arabia, managed by the Housing Development Foundation (SAKAN). The announcement was made in Riyadh on April 8, 2026, showcasing the country's commitment to enhancing housing services and fostering a sense of trust and accountability in the housing sector.

data.title: Innovative Fast-Charging EV Station with Integrated Energy Storage Officially Opens in Duiven
data.description: In Duiven, Netherlands on April 8, 2026, a new high-performance electric vehicle (EV) charging station was officially opened at Nieuwe Tijd. The event marked a significant milestone with partners, international guests, and industry leaders from the e-mobility sector gathering for the celebration. The successful opening highlighted the growing importance and support for EV infrastructure.

data.title: Ribbon Bio Appoints Dr. Urs Spitz as Chair of the Board
data.description: Ribbon Bio, a leading Cell-Free DNA Assembly company, has appointed Dr. Urs Spitz, a former Biosynth CEO and seasoned life sciences investor, to bring his expertise in scaling up operations and governance. The appointment, made on April 8, 2026, aims to leverage Dr. Spitz's experience as Ribbon advances its innovative platform. This move signifies Ribbon's commitment to growth and development in the field, highlighting the importance of strategic leadership.

data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on April 8, 2026, it was reported that AI Agents are transitioning from the cloud to the edge, leading to a rise in the incorporation of AI features in various hardware products. This shift is evident in products like smart speakers, in-vehicle assistants, enterprise terminals, and home gateways. data.title: Why Did Skillsoft (SKIL) Stock Surge After Hours?
data.description: Skillsoft Corp (NYSE: SKIL) experienced a significant 26.98% jump in its share price during after-hours trading, reaching $5.60, following the release of its fourth-quarter fiscal 2026 results. The company outperformed market expectations, with earnings per share surpassing estimates by 10.53% and revenue exceeding predictions by 0.39% for the period ending Jan. 31. In comparison to the same quarter the previous fiscal year, Skillsoft reported the following figures for Q4 Fiscal 2026: Total Revenue of $131 million (down from $134 million in Q4 Fiscal 2025), Adjusted EBITDA of $31.17 million (up from $29.93 million), and Free Cash Flow of $27 million (compared to $13 million). The company achieved an earnings per share of $1.26, surpassing the estimated $1.14 by 10.5%, while revenue also topped forecasts by 0.4%. Talent Development Solutions, Skillsoft's primary unit for enterprise digital learning, contributed $103 million in revenue during the fourth quarter. Ron Hovsepian, Skillsoft's Executive Chair... data.title: GTN appoints former E*TRADE, BUX and Capital.com executive Salim Sebbata as Chief Commercial Officer for Europe
data.description: Bringing more than three decades of experience in the fintech and financial services sectors, Salim Sebbata has been appointed to lead GTN's commercial expansion in the fast-growing investment market of Europe. The announcement was made by GTN, a global fintech company focused on enabling unrestricted investment opportunities. The development was disclosed on April 8, 2026, in London.
